countries.name: Brunei
countries.tip: Choose compact market crafts and sealed food gifts.
countries.chinese_tip: 选择轻便的市集手工艺品和密封食品礼物。

countries.name: Cambodia
countries.chinese_buy: 真丝、贡布胡椒与手工艺
countries.tip: Choose pieces sold by craft workshops and ask about the maker.
countries.chinese_tip: 优先选择手工艺工坊售卖的作品，并询问制作者。

countries.name: Hong Kong
countries.buy: heritage bakery gifts, Hong Kong design objects and transport miniatures
countries.chinese_buy: 传统饼食礼盒、香港设计小物与交通模型
countries.tip: Buy fragile egg rolls near the end of the trip, and visit Central Market or PMQ for independent local-design labels.
countries.chinese_tip: 易碎蛋卷建议在行程后段购买；中环街市和PMQ适合寻找本地独立设计品牌。
countries.shopping_location: Central Market, PMQ, Causeway Bay, Mong Kok and Hong Kong International Airport.

countries.name: Indonesia
countries.tip: Look for hand-stamped or hand-drawn batik, not mass-printed copies.
countries.chinese_tip: 留意手绘或手工盖印蜡染，避开大批量印花仿品。

countries.name: Japan
countries.buy: beautifully wrapped regional sweets, craft and stationery
countries.chinese_buy: 精美包装的地区甜点、工艺品与文具
countries.tip: Japan excels at omiyage: look for sealed, shareable boxes and keep fragile crafts in hand luggage.
countries.chinese_tip: 日本的伴手礼文化非常成熟：选择密封、方便分享的礼盒，易碎工艺品请随身携带。
countries.shopping_location: Tokyo Station, department-store basements, Don Quijote, Hands and major airports.

countries.name: Laos
countries.tip: Local weaving, basketry and paper crafts make light luggage-friendly gifts.
countries.chinese_tip: 织物、竹编和桑皮纸工艺品轻便，也很适合送礼。

countries.name: Malaysia
countries.chinese_buy: 蜡染、宋吉锦与传统零食
countries.tip: Pasar Payang is a good starting point for textiles and traditional snacks.
countries.chinese_tip: Pasar Payang 是寻找纺织品和传统小吃的好起点。

countries.name: Myanmar
countries.tip: Prioritise small, durable handmade pieces; check current travel guidance before planning.
countries.chinese_tip: 优先考虑小巧耐用的手作，并在出行前查看最新旅行建议。
countries.shopping_location: Independent craft shops; verify travel conditions

countries.name: Philippines
countries.chinese_buy: 编织品、芒果与贝壳工艺
countries.tip: Protect fragile shell crafts in hand luggage, and ask how the material was sourced.
countries.chinese_tip: 易碎贝壳工艺品建议随身携带，并询问材料来源。
countries.shopping_location: Department stores and local craft markets

countries.name: Singapore
countries.tip: Design Orchard brings together proudly Singapore-made brands in one stop.
countries.chinese_tip: Design Orchard 汇集许多新加坡本土品牌，可一站式选购。

countries.name: Thailand
countries.tip: OTOP products are a strong place to start for regional specialities.
countries.chinese_tip: 寻找地区特色商品时，OTOP 是很好的起点。

countries.name: Vietnam
countries.chinese_buy: 咖啡、纺织品与食品礼物
countries.tip: Hanoi’s Old Quarter is a great place to compare craft shops; gentle haggling is expected.
countries.chinese_tip: 河内老城区适合比较不同工艺店；温和议价很常见。
countries.shopping_location: Supermarkets, Old Quarter, and craft stores

customsInformation.alcoholLimit: Up to 1 litre total of wine, spirits, beer or malt liquor.
customsInformation.tobaccoLimit: Up to 225 g of tobacco, or the equivalent of 200 cigarettes.
customsInformation.foodRestrictions: Food preparations with a total value of up to RM150. Other food may be subject to separate health, veterinary or agricultural controls.
customsInformation.additionalNote: These traveller exemptions do not override prohibited or restricted-import rules. Check current permits and declarations before travelling.
customsInformation.eligibilityNote: Traveller exemptions have eligibility conditions, including trip-duration requirements. Confirm your circumstances in the official guide.
customsInformation.sourceName: Royal Malaysian Customs Department — Traveller's Guide

customsInformation.alcoholLimit: Choose one: 1.5 L of liquor at 20% ABV or above, 2 L below 20% ABV, or 3 L of beer/other alcoholic drinks.
customsInformation.tobaccoLimit: Choose one: 200 cigarettes, 250 g of shredded tobacco, or 20 cigars.
customsInformation.foodRestrictions: No separate general food allowance is listed for passenger luggage. Animal products and other controlled food may require inspection or approval; check before bringing them in.
customsInformation.additionalNote: Other non-prohibited and non-conditional goods are duty-free up to a total customs value of VND 10,000,000.
customsInformation.eligibilityNote: The passenger allowance does not apply to travellers under 18 for alcohol and tobacco.
customsInformation.sourceName: Vietnam Trade Portal — passenger luggage allowances

customsInformation.alcoholLimit: Eligible travellers may choose one duty-free option: 1 L spirits + 1 L wine, 1 L spirits + 1 L beer, 1 L wine + 1 L beer, 2 L wine, or 2 L beer.
customsInformation.tobaccoLimit: No duty-free concession or GST relief. All tobacco is subject to duty and GST, and it must meet Singapore's standardised-packaging requirement.
customsInformation.foodRestrictions: For most processed foods, combined quantity is up to 5 kg or 5 L and total value up to S$100 per traveller. Product and source-country rules vary.
customsInformation.additionalNote: Liquor concession requires travellers to be at least 18, away for at least 48 hours, and not arriving from Malaysia. Newly bought food and souvenirs may qualify for GST relief separately.
customsInformation.eligibilityNote: Always check Singapore Food Agency's food list before purchasing: permitted products and source countries can change.
customsInformation.sourceName: Singapore Customs — Duty-Free Concession and GST Import Relief

customsInformation.alcoholLimit: Up to 1 litre of alcoholic beverage.
customsInformation.tobaccoLimit: Up to 200 cigarettes, 250 g of tobacco, or 250 g combined across tobacco products.
customsInformation.foodRestrictions: Food, medicines, cosmetics and supplements are restricted goods and may require approval from the relevant authority, including Thailand's FDA. Check the product before travel.
customsInformation.additionalNote: Personal belongings in reasonable quantity may be duty-free up to THB 20,000, but this exemption excludes prohibited, restricted and food goods.
customsInformation.eligibilityNote: Declare goods requiring permits and any quantities above the allowance at the Red Channel.
customsInformation.sourceName: Thai Customs — Guidelines for Airport Passengers

travelSpots.name: Sultan Omar Ali Saifuddien Mosque
travelSpots.shortDescription: A striking white-marble mosque with golden domes and a ceremonial lagoon setting.
travelSpots.whyVisit: Brunei’s signature architecture, serene gardens and sunset photographs.
travelSpots.openingHours: Visitor access varies around prayer times
travelSpots.entranceFee: Free
travelSpots.topActivities: Architecture viewing, photography, riverside walk
travelSpots.travelTips: Dress respectfully and check visiting hours around prayers.
travelSpots.mapQuery: Sultan Omar Ali Saifuddien Mosque, Brunei

travelSpots.name: Angkor Wat
travelSpots.shortDescription: The world’s largest religious monument and the centrepiece of Angkor’s temple complex.
travelSpots.whyVisit: Sunrise, intricate bas-reliefs and monumental Khmer architecture.
travelSpots.entranceFee: Angkor pass required
travelSpots.topActivities: Sunrise viewing, temple exploration, photography
travelSpots.travelTips: Buy your Angkor pass in advance and carry water in the heat.

travelSpots.name: Victoria Peak
travelSpots.shortDescription: Hong Kong Island’s best-known high viewpoint, with a sweeping perspective over Victoria Harbour and Kowloon.
travelSpots.whyVisit: The historic Peak Tram, skyline panoramas and an easy scenic walk make it a first-time essential.
travelSpots.bestTime: Late afternoon to evening for daylight, sunset and city lights
travelSpots.openingHours: Peak Tram and venues have separate daily hours
travelSpots.entranceFee: Peak viewing areas are free; Peak Tram fare applies
travelSpots.topActivities: Peak Tram, Sky Terrace, Lugard Road walk, sunset photography
travelSpots.nearbyAttractions: Central, Hong Kong Park, Lan Kwai Fong
travelSpots.travelTips: Go on a weekday or arrive early; use the Circle Walk for wide views with fewer crowds.
travelSpots.chineseShortDescription: 香港岛最知名的高地观景点，可俯瞰维多利亚港与九龙的壮阔景色。

travelSpots.name: Victoria Harbour & Star Ferry
travelSpots.location: Central and Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong
travelSpots.shortDescription: The iconic harbour crossing links Hong Kong Island and Kowloon with close-up views of the city’s famous skyline.
travelSpots.whyVisit: A short, inexpensive ferry ride delivers one of the world’s most memorable urban waterfront views.
travelSpots.bestTime: Late afternoon or after dark for skyline lights
travelSpots.openingHours: Frequent daily ferry services; check current timetable
travelSpots.entranceFee: Low-cost ferry fare
travelSpots.topActivities: Star Ferry crossing, Avenue of Stars walk, Symphony of Lights viewing
travelSpots.nearbyAttractions: Tsim Sha Tsui Promenade, Clock Tower, Hong Kong Cultural Centre
travelSpots.travelTips: Take the upper deck at least once and keep an Octopus card ready for simple boarding.
travelSpots.mapQuery: Star Ferry Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong
travelSpots.chineseName: 维多利亚港与天星小轮
travelSpots.chineseShortDescription: 标志性的渡轮连接港岛与九龙，让旅客近距离欣赏著名的香港天际线。

travelSpots.name: Tian Tan Buddha & Po Lin Monastery
travelSpots.location: Ngong Ping, Lantau Island, Hong Kong
travelSpots.shortDescription: A 34-metre seated bronze Buddha above Po Lin Monastery, reached through the green hills of Lantau Island.
travelSpots.whyVisit: The 268-step ascent, monastery setting and Ngong Ping cable-car approach offer a calm contrast to the city.
travelSpots.openingHours: Outdoor monument daily; monastery and cable-car hours vary
travelSpots.entranceFee: Buddha area is free; Ngong Ping 360 and optional attractions are ticketed
travelSpots.topActivities: Ngong Ping 360, Buddha steps, monastery visit, Wisdom Path
travelSpots.nearbyAttractions: Tai O Fishing Village, Lantau hiking trails
travelSpots.travelTips: Book cable-car tickets ahead in busy periods and bring water for the steps.
travelSpots.chineseShortDescription: 34米高的铜坐佛矗立于宝莲禅寺之上，坐落在大屿山的青翠山峦之间。

travelSpots.name: Tai Kwun
travelSpots.shortDescription: A carefully restored former police, magistracy and prison compound transformed into a lively heritage and contemporary-arts destination.
travelSpots.whyVisit: Architecture, exhibitions, cafés and courtyards reveal a layered side of Central beyond the skyscrapers.
travelSpots.openingHours: Daily; gallery and programme hours vary
travelSpots.entranceFee: Grounds are free; some exhibitions or events are ticketed
travelSpots.topActivities: Heritage interpretation, art exhibitions, courtyard dining, photography
travelSpots.travelTips: Check the event calendar before visiting and combine it with a walk through Old Town Central.
travelSpots.mapQuery: Tai Kwun Centre for Heritage and Arts, Hong Kong
travelSpots.chineseShortDescription: 由旧警署、裁判署及监狱活化而成的文化地标，现汇聚历史建筑与当代艺术。

travelSpots.name: Temple Street Night Market
travelSpots.shortDescription: A classic Kowloon evening market known for street-food energy, market stalls and old-school Hong Kong atmosphere.
travelSpots.whyVisit: It is a lively place to browse low-cost keepsakes, eat local dishes and experience the city after dark.
travelSpots.entranceFee: Free
travelSpots.topActivities: Street-food dinner, souvenir browsing, market photography
travelSpots.nearbyAttractions: Jade Market, Yau Ma Tei, Kowloon Park
travelSpots.travelTips: Agree on a price before buying and keep valuables secure in the busy lanes.
travelSpots.mapQuery: Temple Street Night Market, Hong Kong
travelSpots.chineseShortDescription: 充满地道香港气氛的九龙夜市，以街头美食、摊档和夜生活闻名。

travelSpots.name: Hong Kong Disneyland
travelSpots.location: Penny's Bay, Lantau Island, Hong Kong
travelSpots.shortDescription: A compact Disney park blending classic attractions with Asia-exclusive experiences and a distinctive castle.
travelSpots.whyVisit: It is easy to combine with a Hong Kong stay and has themed merchandise that makes a popular take-home gift.
travelSpots.openingHours: Daily opening hours vary by date
travelSpots.entranceFee: Ticketed; price varies by day and ticket type
travelSpots.topActivities: World of Frozen, parades, night show, themed shopping
travelSpots.travelTips: Reserve tickets and popular dining early; arrive before opening for shorter first-hour queues.
travelSpots.chineseShortDescription: 规模精巧的迪士尼主题乐园，融合经典游乐设施、亚洲独有体验与特色城堡。

travelSpots.name: Sai Kung & Hong Kong UNESCO Global Geopark
travelSpots.location: Sai Kung, New Territories, Hong Kong
travelSpots.shortDescription: A striking coastal region of volcanic rock, clear water, islands and hiking routes away from the dense urban core.
travelSpots.whyVisit: It shows Hong Kong’s wilder side through boat trips, beaches, seafood and distinctive geological formations.
travelSpots.openingHours: Outdoor destination; boat and visitor-centre hours vary
travelSpots.entranceFee: Free; transport and boat tours cost extra
travelSpots.topActivities: Island boat trip, seafood lunch, hiking, beach time
travelSpots.nearbyAttractions: Sharp Island, High Island Reservoir, Sai Kung Town
travelSpots.travelTips: Check sea conditions before booking a boat and carry sun protection, water and cash.
travelSpots.mapQuery: Hong Kong UNESCO Global Geopark Sai Kung
travelSpots.chineseName: 西贡与香港联合国教科文组织世界地质公园
travelSpots.chineseShortDescription: 远离市区的海岸地区，拥有火山岩地貌、清澈海水、岛屿和远足路线。

travelSpots.name: Borobudur Temple
travelSpots.shortDescription: A vast ninth-century Buddhist monument of stone terraces and bell-shaped stupas.
travelSpots.whyVisit: Sunrise atmosphere, Buddhist art and views over volcanic Central Java.
travelSpots.openingHours: Morning to afternoon; sunrise access varies
travelSpots.entranceFee: Ticketed; check current official price
travelSpots.topActivities: Temple walk, sunrise, relief viewing
travelSpots.travelTips: Wear comfortable shoes and book sunrise access early if offered.

travelSpots.name: Mount Fuji
travelSpots.shortDescription: Japan’s iconic volcanic peak, admired for its near-perfect cone and seasonal landscapes.
travelSpots.whyVisit: Classic views, hiking, lakeside scenery and Japanese cultural symbolism.
travelSpots.bestTime: October–February for clear views; July–September for climbing
travelSpots.entranceFee: Viewing areas vary; climbing rules and fees vary
travelSpots.topActivities: Lake Kawaguchi views, hiking, photography
travelSpots.travelTips: Check visibility forecasts and trail status before travelling.

travelSpots.name: Kuang Si Falls
travelSpots.shortDescription: Tiered turquoise pools and cascades set in lush forest outside Luang Prabang.
travelSpots.whyVisit: Swimming pools, forest walks and an easy nature escape from the old town.
travelSpots.entranceFee: Ticketed; check current local price
travelSpots.topActivities: Swimming, waterfall walk, photography
travelSpots.nearbyAttractions: Luang Prabang Old Town, Tat Kuang Si Bear Rescue Centre
travelSpots.travelTips: Bring swimwear, a towel and shoes with grip.
travelSpots.mapQuery: Kuang Si Falls, Luang Prabang, Laos

travelSpots.name: George Town Heritage Zone
travelSpots.shortDescription: A UNESCO-listed port city of colourful shophouses, clan houses, temples and celebrated street food.
travelSpots.whyVisit: Living heritage, mural walks, Peranakan culture and Malaysia’s most famous food scene.
travelSpots.openingHours: Historic streets are always accessible; sites vary
travelSpots.entranceFee: Public streets free; museums and mansions ticketed
travelSpots.topActivities: Street-art walk, food tour, clan jetties, museum visits
travelSpots.nearbyAttractions: Cheong Fatt Tze Mansion, Kek Lok Si Temple
travelSpots.travelTips: Walk early or late for cooler weather and use a map to find murals beyond the busiest lanes.
travelSpots.chineseShortDescription: 联合国教科文组织世界遗产城区，汇集华人店屋、街头艺术、宗教建筑与多元美食。

travelSpots.name: Melaka Historic City
travelSpots.shortDescription: A UNESCO-recognised Straits trading city shaped by Malay, Chinese, Portuguese, Dutch and British heritage.
travelSpots.whyVisit: Riverside walks, Peranakan culture, historic squares and night-market snacks.
travelSpots.openingHours: Historic district accessible daily; individual sites vary
travelSpots.entranceFee: Public streets free; museums ticketed
travelSpots.topActivities: Jonker Walk, river cruise, Stadthuys, Peranakan food
travelSpots.travelTips: Visit Jonker Street on a weekend evening for the night market, but expect crowds.
travelSpots.chineseShortDescription: 拥有荷兰、葡萄牙与娘惹文化痕迹的河畔古城，也是联合国教科文组织世界遗产地。

travelSpots.name: Langkawi UNESCO Global Geopark
travelSpots.shortDescription: An island archipelago of beaches, mangroves, limestone formations and rainforest landscapes.
travelSpots.whyVisit: Island-hopping, cable-car views, mangrove tours and relaxed beach time.
travelSpots.entranceFee: Island access free; tours and cable car ticketed
travelSpots.topActivities: SkyCab, Kilim mangrove tour, beach hopping
travelSpots.travelTips: Book boat tours with licensed operators and plan outdoor activities before afternoon rain.
travelSpots.chineseName: 浮罗交怡联合国教科文组织世界地质公园
travelSpots.chineseLocation: 吉打浮罗交怡，马来西亚
travelSpots.chineseShortDescription: 由雨林、红树林、石灰岩地貌和安达曼海岛屿组成的热带地质公园。

travelSpots.name: Batu Caves
travelSpots.shortDescription: A dramatic limestone cave complex with Hindu shrines and the towering golden Murugan statue.
travelSpots.whyVisit: Temple culture, colourful steps and one of Kuala Lumpur’s most memorable landmarks.
travelSpots.entranceFee: Main cave access generally free; some caves ticketed
travelSpots.topActivities: Temple visit, stair climb, cave photography
travelSpots.travelTips: Dress modestly, watch for monkeys and bring water for the stairs.
travelSpots.chineseShortDescription: 石灰岩山洞中的印度教圣地，以彩色阶梯和巨大的室建陀神像闻名。

travelSpots.name: Petronas Twin Towers
travelSpots.shortDescription: The twin towers define Kuala Lumpur’s skyline with an elegant steel-and-glass design.
travelSpots.whyVisit: Skybridge views, observation deck and the surrounding KLCC district.
travelSpots.entranceFee: Ticketed; check current official price
travelSpots.topActivities: Skybridge, observation deck, KLCC Park
travelSpots.travelTips: Reserve timed entry online, especially on weekends.
travelSpots.mapQuery: Petronas Twin Towers, Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
travelSpots.chineseShortDescription: 吉隆坡最具代表性的摩天大楼，以伊斯兰几何元素与空中桥梁设计著称。

travelSpots.name: Bagan Archaeological Zone
travelSpots.shortDescription: An immense plain scattered with thousands of Buddhist temples and pagodas.
travelSpots.whyVisit: Sunrise temple views, ancient architecture and e-bike exploration.
travelSpots.openingHours: Daylight hours; access conditions can vary
travelSpots.entranceFee: Archaeological-zone fee may apply
travelSpots.topActivities: E-bike tour, sunrise viewing, temple exploration
travelSpots.travelTips: Check current local travel guidance before making plans.

travelSpots.name: Chocolate Hills
travelSpots.shortDescription: More than a thousand rounded limestone hills that turn cocoa-brown in the dry season.
travelSpots.whyVisit: A uniquely Philippine landscape with broad viewing-deck panoramas.
travelSpots.entranceFee: Small local entrance fee
travelSpots.topActivities: Viewing deck, countryside drive, photography
travelSpots.travelTips: Visit early for cooler temperatures and clearer views.

travelSpots.name: Gardens by the Bay
travelSpots.shortDescription: A futuristic waterfront garden known for its Supertree Grove and cooled conservatories.
travelSpots.whyVisit: Cloud forests, floral displays, skyline views and evening light shows.
travelSpots.openingHours: Outdoor gardens daily; conservatory hours vary
travelSpots.entranceFee: Outdoor gardens free; conservatories ticketed
travelSpots.topActivities: Supertree light show, Cloud Forest, Flower Dome
travelSpots.travelTips: Book conservatory tickets online and stay for the evening light show.

travelSpots.name: The Grand Palace
travelSpots.shortDescription: Bangkok’s dazzling former royal complex, home to the sacred Emerald Buddha.
travelSpots.whyVisit: Thai architecture, gilded temples and royal history.
travelSpots.entranceFee: Ticketed; check current official price
travelSpots.topActivities: Temple photography, Wat Phra Kaew, royal architecture
travelSpots.travelTips: Dress modestly, arrive early and ignore unofficial ticket touts.

travelSpots.name: Hội An Ancient Town
travelSpots.shortDescription: A lantern-lit riverside trading town with preserved timber houses, temples and Japanese-influenced bridges.
travelSpots.whyVisit: Atmospheric evenings, cycling lanes, cooking classes and heritage architecture.
travelSpots.openingHours: Old town is accessible daily; ticketed heritage sites have daytime hours
travelSpots.entranceFee: Old Town sightseeing ticket required for many heritage sites
travelSpots.topActivities: Lantern walk, cycling, cooking class, market visit
travelSpots.nearbyAttractions: An Bàng Beach, My Son Sanctuary
travelSpots.travelTips: Explore early morning or after sunset, and carry small cash for food stalls.
travelSpots.chineseShortDescription: 灯笼点缀的河畔贸易古镇，保留木造民居、庙宇与日式建筑影响。

travelSpots.name: Tràng An Scenic Landscape Complex
travelSpots.shortDescription: A UNESCO-listed landscape of limestone karsts, waterways, caves and ancient temples.
travelSpots.whyVisit: Rowboat journeys through cave tunnels and dramatic ‘land Ha Long Bay’ scenery.
travelSpots.entranceFee: Boat-route ticket required; check current local price
travelSpots.topActivities: Sampan boat ride, cave passage, temple stops
travelSpots.nearbyAttractions: Tam Cốc, Hoa Lư Ancient Capital
travelSpots.travelTips: Go early to avoid crowds and bring sun protection for the open boat.
travelSpots.mapQuery: Trang An Scenic Landscape Complex, Ninh Binh, Vietnam
travelSpots.chineseShortDescription: 联合国教科文组织世界遗产地，拥有石灰岩峰林、水道、洞穴与古老寺庙。

travelSpots.name: Phong Nha–Kẻ Bàng National Park
travelSpots.shortDescription: A dramatic karst national park celebrated for huge cave systems, rivers and jungle landscapes.
travelSpots.whyVisit: Cave excursions, river trips and some of Asia’s most spectacular underground scenery.
travelSpots.openingHours: Tours operate in daylight; weather affects access
travelSpots.entranceFee: Cave and tour fees vary
travelSpots.topActivities: Phong Nha Cave boat tour, Paradise Cave, jungle trekking
travelSpots.travelTips: Book specialist caves well ahead and avoid the wettest months for more reliable access.
travelSpots.mapQuery: Phong Nha Ke Bang National Park, Vietnam
travelSpots.chineseShortDescription: 以巨型洞穴系统、河流和丛林喀斯特地貌闻名的壮丽国家公园。

travelSpots.name: Ho Chi Minh City
travelSpots.shortDescription: Vietnam’s energetic southern metropolis, mixing colonial landmarks, markets, museums and modern cafés.
travelSpots.whyVisit: Food, history, local markets and a fast-moving urban atmosphere.
travelSpots.entranceFee: Most public areas free; museums are ticketed
travelSpots.topActivities: Ben Thanh Market, War Remnants Museum, street-food tour
travelSpots.travelTips: Use ride-hailing for longer trips and plan indoor museum visits during the hottest part of the day.
travelSpots.chineseShortDescription: 越南南部充满活力的大都会，融合殖民地建筑、市场、博物馆与现代咖啡文化。

travelSpots.name: Ha Long Bay
travelSpots.shortDescription: A UNESCO World Heritage seascape of limestone islands rising from emerald water.
travelSpots.whyVisit: Cruises, kayaking, caves and wide coastal views.
travelSpots.entranceFee: From 290,000 VND
travelSpots.topActivities: Cruise, kayak, cave exploration
travelSpots.nearbyAttractions: Ti Top Island, Sung Sot Cave
travelSpots.travelTips: Book a cruise ahead, bring sunscreen and check weather conditions.
travelSpots.mapQuery: Ha Long Bay, Quang Ninh, Vietnam
travelSpots.chineseShortDescription: 由石灰岩岛屿从翡翠色海水中拔起的联合国教科文组织世界遗产海景。

travelSpots.name: Hà Nội
travelSpots.shortDescription: A standout historic capital destination in Vietnam with distinctive landscapes, culture and local experiences.
travelSpots.whyVisit: Old Quarter lanes, lakes, museums and a celebrated food culture.
travelSpots.entranceFee: Fees vary by attraction; check current local information
travelSpots.topActivities: Old Quarter walk, street-food tour, water puppets
travelSpots.nearbyAttractions: Hoàn Kiếm Lake, Temple of Literature
travelSpots.travelTips: Cross roads carefully and explore early for a quieter Old Quarter.
travelSpots.chineseShortDescription: 越南历史首都，拥有老城区巷弄、湖泊、博物馆和丰富的美食文化。

travelSpots.name: Sa Pa Rice Terraces
travelSpots.shortDescription: A standout mountain landscape destination in Vietnam with distinctive landscapes, culture and local experiences.
travelSpots.whyVisit: Rice terraces, mountain trails and highland village culture.
travelSpots.entranceFee: Fees vary by attraction; check current local information
travelSpots.topActivities: Trekking, Fansipan cable car, village visits
travelSpots.travelTips: Bring layers: mountain weather changes quickly.
travelSpots.chineseShortDescription: 高山梯田与少数民族村落交织的凉爽山城景观。

travelSpots.name: Huế Imperial City
travelSpots.shortDescription: A standout imperial heritage destination in Vietnam with distinctive landscapes, culture and local experiences.
travelSpots.whyVisit: Nguyễn-dynasty palaces, tombs and refined central-Vietnam cuisine.
travelSpots.entranceFee: Fees vary by attraction; check current local information
travelSpots.topActivities: Imperial Citadel, Perfume River cruise, royal tombs
travelSpots.nearbyAttractions: Thiên Mụ Pagoda, Khải Định Tomb
travelSpots.travelTips: Use a bicycle or driver to link the dispersed tombs.
travelSpots.chineseShortDescription: 阮朝皇宫、陵墓与香江两岸景观共同构成的越南皇城文化中心。

travelSpots.name: Đà Nẵng
travelSpots.shortDescription: A standout coastal city destination in Vietnam with distinctive landscapes, culture and local experiences.
travelSpots.whyVisit: Long beaches, modern city energy and easy access to central Vietnam.
travelSpots.entranceFee: Fees vary by attraction; check current local information
travelSpots.topActivities: My Khe Beach, Sơn Trà Peninsula, Marble Mountains
travelSpots.travelTips: Plan beaches early and leave room for a day trip to Hội An.
travelSpots.chineseShortDescription: 拥有绵长海滩、现代城市氛围，并可轻松前往越南中部名胜的海滨城市。

travelSpots.name: Nha Trang Bay
travelSpots.shortDescription: A standout beach resort destination in Vietnam with distinctive landscapes, culture and local experiences.
travelSpots.whyVisit: A broad city beach backed by islands, seafood and water sports.
travelSpots.entranceFee: Fees vary by attraction; check current local information
travelSpots.topActivities: Island hopping, snorkelling, beach time
travelSpots.nearbyAttractions: Po Nagar Cham Towers, Hon Mun
travelSpots.travelTips: Book licensed boat trips and use reef-safe sunscreen.
travelSpots.chineseShortDescription: 由城市海滩、岛屿、海鲜与水上活动组成的热带海湾度假地。

travelSpots.name: Đà Lạt
travelSpots.shortDescription: A standout highland retreat destination in Vietnam with distinctive landscapes, culture and local experiences.
travelSpots.whyVisit: Cool pine-covered hills, flower farms and café culture.
travelSpots.entranceFee: Fees vary by attraction; check current local information
travelSpots.topActivities: Waterfalls, coffee farms, lakeside walks
travelSpots.travelTips: Pack a light jacket for cool evenings.
travelSpots.chineseShortDescription: 松林覆盖的凉爽高原城市，以花卉农场、湖泊和咖啡馆文化闻名。

travelSpots.name: Phú Quốc Island
travelSpots.shortDescription: A standout island escape destination in Vietnam with distinctive landscapes, culture and local experiences.
travelSpots.whyVisit: Tropical beaches, clear water and a relaxed island pace.
travelSpots.entranceFee: Fees vary by attraction; check current local information
travelSpots.topActivities: Beach hopping, snorkelling, sunset viewing
travelSpots.nearbyAttractions: Sao Beach, Phú Quốc National Park
travelSpots.travelTips: Book ferries and flights early in peak season.
travelSpots.chineseShortDescription: 拥有热带海滩、清澈海水和悠闲岛屿节奏的越南南部岛屿。

travelSpots.name: Mũi Né Sand Dunes
travelSpots.shortDescription: A standout coastal landscape destination in Vietnam with distinctive landscapes, culture and local experiences.
travelSpots.whyVisit: A beach town famed for red and white dunes and wind sports.
travelSpots.entranceFee: Fees vary by attraction; check current local information
travelSpots.topActivities: Kitesurfing, sand dunes, Fairy Stream
travelSpots.travelTips: Visit dunes around sunrise or sunset and protect electronics from sand.
travelSpots.chineseShortDescription: 以红白沙丘、海滩与风帆运动闻名的海岸小镇。

travelSpots.name: Hà Giang Loop
travelSpots.shortDescription: A standout mountain road trip destination in Vietnam with distinctive landscapes, culture and local experiences.
travelSpots.whyVisit: A spectacular mountain route through limestone passes and ethnic minority villages.
travelSpots.entranceFee: Fees vary by attraction; check current local information
travelSpots.topActivities: Motorbike loop, mountain passes, homestays
travelSpots.nearbyAttractions: Mã Pí Lèng Pass, Nho Quế River
travelSpots.travelTips: Use an experienced local driver if you are not confident on mountain roads.
travelSpots.chineseShortDescription: 穿越石灰岩山口与少数民族村落的壮观北部山地路线。

travelSpots.name: Côn Đảo Islands
travelSpots.shortDescription: A standout island nature destination in Vietnam with distinctive landscapes, culture and local experiences.
travelSpots.whyVisit: Quiet beaches, marine life and a powerful historic landscape.
travelSpots.entranceFee: Fees vary by attraction; check current local information
travelSpots.topActivities: Snorkelling, beach walks, turtle-season visits
travelSpots.nearbyAttractions: Côn Đảo National Park, Côn Sơn town
travelSpots.travelTips: Accommodation is limited; reserve early in high season.
travelSpots.chineseShortDescription: 宁静海滩、海洋生物与深刻历史记忆并存的群岛。
